feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,356Chapters: 10/16Kudos: 23

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Gold Star
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,065Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 159

Summary: “Always such a smartass,” Finstock insisted, shaking his head. “What, you want a gold star for your mediocre performance?”“If you’ve got any, I’d love one,” Stiles informed him.“You’re too old for a gold star, Bilinski.”“Hey, hey,” Stiles argued, holding one hand out towards the man as he headed back for the board—evidently forgetting Greenberg now had his marker. “Sometimes adults need gold stars, too.” When Coach turned back to give him a look, Stiles just shrug-flailed. “We’re all just little gremlins starving for attention! Do you know how satisfying a gold star would be? Right here?” Stiles motioned his right pectoral up near his shoulder. “Just a cute little star right there. ‘Good Job!’ or ‘I’m proud of you!’ or even just ‘Well done!’ So satisfying. Or what about like, a hero biscuit?” Stiles mimed nibbling on a cookie. “Cute little bone-shaped cookie made for heroes? Wouldn’t that just brighten your day?”“Stop talking or I’ll bench you.”“I’m always benched,” Stiles argued.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,212Chapters: 8/39Kudos: 54

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,801Chapters: 21/25Kudos: 1,144

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,428Chapters: 22/45Kudos: 50

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: The Extremely Unofficial Guide to Beacon Hills Boarding School
entry.summary:
Author: randomreader46

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,994Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Winning a scholarship to Beacon Hills Preparatory is supposed to be Stiles Stilinski’s fresh start.Instead, he gets rich kids with trust funds, a campus that looks suspiciously like a murder mystery setting, a new best friend within approximately ten minutes, and Derek Hale — Beacon’s perpetually scowling lacrosse captain, who seems to dislike Stiles on sight.Honestly? Rude.______________________Tags will update as the fic progresses to prevent spoilers

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,600Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 119

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: Blood for blood
entry.summary:
Author: McNozzoFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,431Chapters: 11/20Kudos: 107

Summary: "Are you going to call him?" Deputy McKenzie asked him while they looked at the half body in the hole. This was not an ordinary crime, the Sheriff knew that, starting with how they found out about this body until everything related to it. "I already called, he'll be here in no time now." he answered while getting up, checking everything around the area, to be sure he wasn't missing anything."Who?" A younger deputy asks his partner. "Detetive Stilinski." McKenzie answered. "Who?""His father used to be the Sheriff before Sheriff Parrish.""I didn't know we have a detective in the Beacon Hills""Not here, from the county."*There's a crime that harkens back to the past and it makes Stiles have to confront his feelings, the ones he has buried deep down in his heart, while dealing with possible revenge on top of all the shit even 3 years after the dread doctors brought in a prehistoric wolf.

entry.title: Home is where your Wi-Fi connects
entry.summary:
Author: nothing_much

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 928Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 11

Summary: As he walked down the corridor to his dorm room his phone beeped with a notification. It startled him. He’d had problems with his Wi-Fi all day, and well. It turned out he hadn’t paid for it. He’d gotten a bit distracted when he’d sat down to pay his bills this month. Well the distraction was the account being almost empty, and the reasons why said accounts were empty. And then food.

entry.title: song of the phoenix
entry.summary:
Author: graveltotempo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 236,663Chapters: 59/60Kudos: 7,268

Summary: In a last ditch effort to save Beacon Hills after everyone else has died, Stiles channels all of his energy and magic into cleansing the Nemeton and the magical core of the town. But he is more powerful than he knows, more connected to the Nemeton than anyone can guess, and a group of kids, teenagers and adults wakes up in the middle of the night ten years earlier with a second chance they didn't know they needed and a bond they don't understand. Stiles though? Stiles wakes up with a little more.

entry.title: My Hot Witch Boyfriend
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,797Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 337

Summary: “How are you?” Stiles asked, falling onto the couch beside Derek and leaning heavily into him. “How was your day? How’s the book?” He kissed his cheek once. Twice. Then two more times in quick succession. Derek turned to look at him, Stiles affecting his most innocent expression as he patiently waited for Derek to answer his questions. Instead of doing so, Derek slowly closed his book, losing his page, and set it on the coffee table in front of them. Then he turned to look at Stiles, leaning back slightly against the arm rest, and crossed his arms. “What do you want?”

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 276,770Chapters: 20/21Kudos: 27

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,417Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 341

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: BLOODLINE PROTOCOL
entry.summary:
Author: knox_rivers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 164,737Chapters: 48/?Kudos: 193

Summary: At Beacon Hills Preparatory, tradition is everything. For over a century, the elite boarding school has divided its student body into five historic houses where each one seemingly determined by a mix of academic performance, behavior, and an unspoken layer of socioeconomic legacy. Most students follow in the footsteps of their families; generation after generation they're sorted into the same houses. No one questions the system. It’s simply the way things are. Until now. Midway through his freshman year, a “routine” blood test for school health records takes an unexpected turn. One sharp-witted yet grounded Stiles, recently appointed as House Prefect of the mid-tier House Flagstaff largely due to his father’s position as the town sheriff, is abruptly reassigned to House Redwood, the school’s most elite and secretive house. He must now navigate secret traditions, political manipulation, and a slow-burning forbidden romance with someone he was never meant to meet: the enigmatic sophomore son of a ruthless defense attorney.

entry.title: Packbound
entry.summary:
Author: Stillreadingfanfictbh

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,695Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 19

Summary: Stiles Stilinski never expected a single strange invitation to pull him into the Hale pack’s world, but suddenly he’s living in a house that hums, learning rules no one explains, and feeling things no human should. What starts as temporary refuge becomes a slow, unsettling sense of belonging as the land, the pack, and Derek Hale himself begin to pull him in. Between hunters, old grief, and a bond he was never meant to touch, Stiles has to decide whether he’s losing himself or finally finding where he fits.

entry.summary:
Author: GDTiger

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,801Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 150

entry.title: By My Side
entry.summary:
Author: HyperDoctor11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,362Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Genevive Stilinski is no ordinary mundane as she was led to believe her entire life. She learns on her eighteenth birthday that she's half-Shadowhunter and half-Demon, a Warlock. Her mother's secret. All the legends are true. Gen happens to be one of those legends. Genevive doesn't expect her baby cousin, Clary Fray's, own eighteenth birthday to blow up in their faces when Jocelyn goes missing and the two of them are taken to a Shadowhunter Institute. Gen must come to an understanding within herself about who she is and whose side she is on. On thing is for certain. Genevive's life will never go back to the way it was before.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_A

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,408Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 57

Summary: Seems like everyone BUT Stiles is in on a secret involving Stiles and Derek yet no one is willing to help the poor human and let him know. Meanwhile Derek is trying desperately to not show any emotions that might hint at the truth. All of this is going on when the pack is under attack by a strange wolf pack threatening to take over the Hale land.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
